intro:
Human moderation has become the central trust factor in dating apps in 2026. Automated detection misses too many cases, and the consequences — harassment, scams, unsolicited explicit content — genuinely impact users.

Embir has invested in human moderation from day one. Every report is reviewed by a team member.

comparisonTable.embir: Human team + review of every report
Immediate permanent ban for severe violations

sections.title: Why human moderation changes everything
sections.content: An algorithm can detect a keyword. It can't understand context, nuance an ambiguous situation, or evaluate if a profile is subtly malicious. Embir's human moderation team examines these cases with judgment. Every report = a real review, not an automated 'your report has been received' response.
highlights: Every report reviewed by a human, not a bot

verdict: If safety and trust are your top priorities in a dating app, Embir is the best choice in 2026: systematic human moderation, selfie verification, and zero tolerance for harassment.
ctaText: Safety through human moderation — join Embir

faq.q: How does Embir's human moderation work?
faq.a: Every report is reviewed by a team member. For severe violations (harassment, unsolicited explicit content, scams), the ban is immediate and permanent.

faq.q: How long to process a report?
faq.a: Target is under 24h. Urgent cases are prioritized.

faq.q: Is moderation available to all users?
faq.a: Yes. Human moderation applies to all users regardless of subscription level. Safety isn't a premium feature.
